text: Now a key trick. Negative sine alpha plus i cosine alpha equals i times open paren cosine alpha plus i sine alpha close paren. Apply that here. We get i times e to the negative theta over r times open paren cosine natural log r plus i sine natural log r close paren. But that bracket is exactly f over e to the negative theta over... wait, the bracket times e to the negative theta is f. So u sub r plus i v sub r equals i over r times f of z.
